channel.title: Red-Team on jkt's blogs
channel.description: Recent content in Red-Team on jkt's blogs

item.title: Dissecting HackTheBox Pro Labs: The Art of Attacking Enterprise Networks
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A comprehensive review of HTB Pro Labs — POO, Dante, Zephyr, and Offshore — with key takeaways, practical tips, and honest insights.

item.title: TryHackMe Red Teaming Pathway — Full Review
item.author: Justin Kombe Tonguino
item.description: A full breakdown of the TryHackMe Red Teaming path — adversary simulation, evasion, Active Directory, and key takeaways.
